KXBIG3GAME-26JUL12BOSCHI-BOS.rules_primary: If Boston Ball Hogs wins the Boston Ball Hogs vs Chicago Triplets BIG3 basketball game originally scheduled for Jul 12, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
KXBIG3GAME-26JUL12BOSCHI-BOS.rules_secondary: The following market refers to the team who wins the Boston Ball Hogs vs Chicago Triplets BIG3 basketball game originally scheduled for Jul 12, 2026. If this game is postponed or delayed, the market will remain open and close after the rescheduled game has finished (within two weeks).
